hero.badge: Free to use · No credit card required
hero.subtitle: Track shared expenses across any currency, let Smart Settle minimise who pays whom, and settle up with one tap.

features.title: Everything you need to split fairly
features.subtitle: Whether it's a weekend trip or a shared apartment, BillSplitter keeps everyone on the same page.

multicurrency.title: Multi-currency
multicurrency.desc: Log expenses in any of 30+ currencies. Everyone sees totals in their preferred currency with live exchange rates.

smartSettle.title: Smart Settle
smartSettle.desc: Our algorithm collapses group debts to the minimum number of transfers.

realtime.title: Real-time sync
realtime.desc: Add an expense and every group member sees it instantly — no refresh needed.

insights.title: Spending Insights
insights.desc: Visualise where money goes over time. Spot patterns and understand group spending at a glance.

roles.title: Smart Roles
roles.desc: Admins, editors, and viewers — each member gets exactly the access they need.

precision.title: Precision Totals
precision.desc: Add tax and tip per expense — splits always reflect the true cost.

secure.title: Secure by default
secure.desc: Row-level security means each user only ever sees their own groups.

settle.label: Transfers reduced by Smart Settle
settle.desc: In a group of 4, naïve splitting needs up to 9 individual payments. Smart Settle finds the mathematically minimal set — usually 3 or fewer.

cta.title: Ready to settle up?
cta.subtitle: Free forever for small groups. Sign in with Google or email — no credit card needed.

footer.copyright: © {{year}} BillSplitter. Built with ♥ for travellers and flatmates.

auth.title: Welcome to BillSplitter
auth.subtitle: Sign in or create a free account
auth.emailSentDesc: We sent a magic link to
auth.terms: By continuing you agree to our Terms and Privacy Policy.

signIn.title: Sign in
signIn.subtitle: Use Google or a magic link to get started.
signIn.magicLinkSent: We sent a magic link to {{email}}

dashboard.title: Summary
dashboard.isOwed: {{name}} is waiting for {{amount}} in total settlements.
dashboard.needsToPay: {{name}} needs to pay others {{amount}} to settle up.
dashboard.allSettled: {{name}} is all settled! No debts or credits.

expense.feesDisabledHint: Enter an amount above to enable tax & tip fields.
expense.errorRatesLoading: Exchange rates are still loading. Wait or set a manual rate.
expense.errorInvalidRate: Please enter a valid manual exchange rate.

expenseList.title: Expenses
expenseList.clickToSelect: Click an expense to include it in settlement

settlement.title: How to settle up
settlement.noInvitedMembers: No other invited members in this group.
settlement.desktopTip: Paying from a computer? Copy the handle and paste it into your payment provider's website.
settlement.zelleInstruction: Scan with your banking app, or copy the handle below.

members.title: Members
members.cannotRemove: Cannot remove a member who has an active balance. Settle all debts first.
members.noBalance: Cannot remove member with a balance.

auth.signInDesc: Sign in to sync your expenses across all your devices.

noGroups.title: Welcome to BillSplitter
noGroups.subtitle: Create a group for your trip, household, or any shared expense — or join one with an invite code.

profile.title: Profile
profile.currencyDesc: Synced on sign-in. Changeable any time in the header.
profile.taxRateTooltip: This rate will be automatically applied to all new expenses you create. You can still override it per expense.
profile.taxRateDesc: Leave at 0 to disable auto-tax. Applied to every new expense.
profile.desktopModalLabel: Use modal for adding expenses on desktop
profile.desktopModalDesc: When off, the form is shown inline. Default: off.
profile.paymentHandlesDesc: Members can tap these to pay you directly. No @ or $.

tour.step1Body: Start by adding everyone who's sharing expenses — friends, family, or flatmates.
tour.step2Body: Tap Add Expense to record who paid and how to split it. Works with any currency.
tour.step3Body: Split equally with one tap, or set exact amounts for each person.
tour.step4Body: Smart Settle finds the minimum number of payments to clear all debts.
tour.saveDesc: Create a free account to sync across devices and share with others.

feedback.title: Send Feedback
feedback.thanks: Thanks! We'll review your feedback shortly.
feedback.error: Something went wrong — please try again.

sidebar.shareCode: Share this code so others can join.
sidebar.taxRateDesc: Auto-applied to every new expense in this group. Overrides your profile default.
sidebar.freePlanDesc: You've used all {{limit}} free groups. Upgrade to Pro for unlimited groups.
sidebar.upgradeProDesc: Upgrade to Pro for more groups.
sidebar.leaveGroupMsg: Are you sure? You will lose access to {{name}}'s history and will need a new invite code to rejoin.
sidebar.deleteGroupMsg:
DANGER: This will permanently delete all expenses, splits, members, and activity for everyone in "{{name}}".

This cannot be undone.
